RegLoan Bank — Form W-2 Wage and Tax Statement Document W2-0005 Page 1 of 1 Employee: Priya Dubois SSN: TKN-120905 Box Description Amount ($) 1 Wages, tips, other comp. 82,439 2 Federal income tax withheld 5,196 3 Social security wages 82,986 4 Social security tax withheld 3,411 5 Medicare wages and tips 47,658 6 Medicare tax withheld 1,372
